name: Warby Parker Inc.
description: Warby Parker Inc. is an American eyewear brand and retailer that specializes in prescription glasses, contact lenses, and sunglasses. Founded in 2010 and headquartered in New York City, the company is widely recognized for its direct-to-consumer business model, which allows it to design and sell high-quality, fashionable eyewear directly to customers at a lower price point. In addition to its online retail platform, Warby Parker operates numerous physical retail locations across the United States and provides comprehensive eye care services, including professional eye exams, to support its mission of making vision care accessible and affordable.
